query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_cases,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es IS NULL OR title_es = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_title_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description_es IS NULL OR description_es = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_desc_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN legal_basis IS NOT NULL AND legal_basis != '' AND (legal_basis_es IS NULL OR legal_basis_es = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_legal_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN procedure_steps IS NOT NULL AND procedure_steps != '' AND (procedure_es IS NULL OR procedure_es = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_proc_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN examples IS NOT NULL AND examples != '' AND (examples_es IS NULL OR examples_es = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_examples_es
FROM special_cases;
